SPRight.name: IID_SUP_RefreshButtons
SPRight.Description: Allows this user to see any refresh buttons

SPRight.name: IID_SUP_IdentityXML
SPRight.Description: Allows this user to use the backtick-for-xml feature

Capability.name: IID_SUP_RefreshButtons
Capability.Description: Allows this user to see Identity Warehouse refresh buttons

Capability.Description: Allows this user to use the backtick-for-xml feature
